prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines fees related to veterinary medicinal products, which falls under the regulatory framework applicable in England, particularly within the Veterinary Medicines Regulations (VMR). These regulations and associated fees are enforced by the relevant authorities in England.
